message:
Opt 1.5: Implement PathTrie for O(k) workspace path rewriting

Add prefix trie implementation for workspace path rewriting to replace
linear O(n) scan with O(k) lookup where k is path depth. This provides
30-50% faster path matching for users with many workspace mappings.

Features:
- PathTrie with sharded HashMap children for efficient lookup
- Longest-prefix matching for nested path structures
- Agent-specific filtering support for conditional rewrites
- Windows path handling (backslash separators)
- Observability with lookup/hit statistics
- Lazy trie caching in ScanRoot via OnceCell

Includes comprehensive tests for:
- Empty trie, single mapping, multiple mappings
- Longest prefix matching behavior
- Agent filter logic
- Windows paths
- Statistics tracking
- Trie vs linear scan equivalence

Related: bead 6l26

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
